creator: bsditer@gmail.com
text:
system always reboot while quit apache activemq (http://activemq.apache.org/index.html)

same problem with diablo-jdk-freebsd6.amd64.1.5.0.07.01 and jdk 1.6.

How-To-Repeat: $ cd /usr/local/activemq/bin
$ ./activemq

<< press Ctrl+C to quit >>
.. then system reboot ...
